narrative:
Olmsted Falls-04-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 731 registered voters, with 55.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 28.7%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 13.3 percentage points.
